args.query: title:"Navigation flicker when transitioning Detail → Detail on tablets" is:issue repo:rpnr-bench/T05_R02 state:open
Navigation flicker Detail tablet is:issue repo:rpnr-bench/T05_R02 state:open

content.text:
| MCP:bXofx8 | {"total_count":1,"incomplete_results":false,"items":[{"id":4603981291,"number":1,"state":"open","locked":false,"title":"Navigation flicker when transitioning Detail → Detail on tablets","body":"Filing this as a tracker for an issue we keep running into on the foldables / tablets QA pass.

When you tap "Random character" twice in a row, the destination Detail screen sometimes shows the previous character for ~200ms before swapping in the new one. The flicker is reproducible on a Pixel Fold and on the 7" tablet emulator, intermittent on phones.

Looking at the code, the navigation graph re-uses `CharactersDetailViewModel` across destinations of the same route. I think the issue is that the loading state from the previous fetch leaks into the new screen before the new fetch completes.

Components that I think are involved:
- `composebase/features/screen/charactersdetail/` (UI + ViewModel)
- `composebase/network/repository/CharactersRepository.kt`
- `composebase/composeNavigation/` (graph/host)

Happy to send a PR once we agree on the component owner.

data.content:
**Issue:** [Navigation flicker when transitioning Detail → Detail on tablets](https://github.com/rpnr-bench/T05_R02/issues/1) (open)

### Per-component breakdown

| Component | Symptom / Proposed fix (from issue body + comments) |
|---|---|
| **UI** | The Detail screen briefly renders the previous character’s data (~200 ms) before swapping to the new one, causing a visible flicker on tablets/foldables. |
| **Navigation** | The navigation graph re-uses the same `CharactersDetailViewModel` instance across destinations of the same route, allowing the loading state from a previous fetch to leak into the new screen before the new fetch completes. |
| **Networking** | The ViewModel launches a new coroutine for each tap, resulting in two separate `getCharacter` network requests even when the second tap occurs after the first response; a `flatMapLatest` operator is suggested to de-duplicate in-flight requests. |
| **Build/Gradle** | The flicker has been present since upgrading to Compose BOM 2023-11, implying a possible dependency or API change introduced by that BOM version. |
| **Tests** | No specific test failure is mentioned; the issue was caught during a manual foldables/tablets QA pass, highlighting a gap in automated UI-transition tests for tablet form factors. |
